name: cdfeirense-tv
description: CDF TV Manager - Clube Desportivo Feirense

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx tsc && npx tsc --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir dist/seed --rootDir . prisma/seed.ts
scripts.migrate: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate
